stdout:
Usage: gaia search lkm [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Search the Bohrium LKM knowledge graph (5 verbs + auth).

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ knowledge         Search LKM knowledge nodes (POST /search).                 │
│ reasoning         Fetch reasoning chains for a claim (GET                    │
│                   /claims/{id}/reasoning).                                   │
│ reasoning-search  Search reasoning chains (POST /reasoning/search).          │
│ variables         Batch-hydrate variable detail (POST /variables/batch).     │
│ paper-graph       Fetch a paper's knowledge graph (POST /papers/graph).      │
│ auth              Manage the LKM access key (login / status / logout /       │
│                   rotate).                                                   │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

 Endpoints (all under https://open.bohrium.com/openapi/v1/lkm):
 knowledge        POST /search             — recall knowledge nodes   reasoning
 GET  /claims/{id}/reasoning — chains backing one claim   reasoning-search POST
 /reasoning/search   — recall whole reasoning chains   variables        POST
 /variables/batch    — hydrate variable detail by id   paper-graph      POST
 /papers/graph       — a paper's knowledge graph
 Auth: every call needs a Bohrium access key. Run `gaia search lkm auth login`
 to set one up (or set GAIA_LKM_ACCESS_KEY / LKM_ACCESS_KEY).
 Exit codes: 0 ok / 1 business error / 2 transport / 3 no key / 4 bad args.
 Note: the `score` field returned by `knowledge` / `reasoning-search` is a
 retrieval ranking signal, not a probability — do not pass it to Gaia priors.
